creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
I am unable to build the graphicsw/libGLU port. First, I receive a 'checksum' error message. Then, when I use the "NO_CHECKSUM=yes" flag, I receive a message that the libGLU-7.4.2.1 file is corrupt and I should use bzip2recover to attempt to fix it.

I have done a distclean and re-downloaded the port three times, several hours apart, and the problem still exists.

This problem is preventing me from installing the 'print/hplip' port that I need.

How-To-Repeat: Try to install the port.
